info.description: API for the E-commerce backend service.
info.title: E-commerce API

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, setting an HttpOnly access token cookie
Clears the access token cookie. Public route — works even without a valid session, so the frontend can always clear a stale cookie.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's own safe data (no password/hash). Requires authentication.

post.description: Publicly register a new account. Always creates the "customer" role — clients cannot choose a different role.

get.description: Lists orders with pagination, using the same page/pageSize format as products and users. Customer sees only their own orders (and is counted only among their own); admin sees and counts all.

post.description: Creates a new order for the authenticated user. The order owner always comes from the authenticated session — customer and admin cannot send customer_id/user_id/owner_id in the body.

get.description: Returns an order with its items. Customer can only access their own orders; admin can access any order. Orders belonging to another user are reported as not found.

post.description: Moves an order from PENDING to CANCELED and returns all quantities to stock. Customer can only cancel their own orders; admin can cancel any order.
Moves an order from PENDING to PAID. Only the order owner can pay it, whether customer or admin — admin does not get a bypass to pay other people's orders.

get.description: Lists products with filters and pagination. Public route.
Returns a product by its ID. Public route.

put.description: Update an existing product. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a product. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

patch.description: Activates a product. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.
Deactivates a product. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.
Restores a soft-deleted product. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

get.description: Lists users with filters and pagination. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

post.description: Create a new user (customer or admin). Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

get.description: Returns a user by its ID. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

put.description: Update an existing user, including role. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

patch.description: Activates a user. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.
Deactivates a user. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.
Restores a soft-deleted user. Requires authentication and the "admin" role.

get.description: Returns application status, name, version and current timestamp. Public route.

CookieAuth.description: JWT access token set as an HttpOnly cookie by POST /api/v1/auth/login.
CookieAuth.name: access_token
